title: senecio riddellii
intro: Senecio riddellii, also known as Riddell's groundsel, is a plant species native to New Zealand, characterized by its small yellow daisy-like flowers and narrow leaves. The plant is known to possess medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural anti-inflammatory and antioxidant. The health benefits of Senecio riddellii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its traditional use as a treatment for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Senecio riddellii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
